text:
'Ojisan wa Kawaii Mono ga Osuki.' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, First Promo for Fall 2026
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Tsutomu's Ojisan wa Kawaii Mono ga Osuki. (Middle-Aged Man Loves Cute Things) manga revealed the main cast, staff, and a first promotional video on Thursday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere in October 2026. Cast Mitsutaka Oji: Kazuyuki Okitsu (The Fable) Pugtaro: Miyu Tomita (Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai? Tensai-tachi no Renai Zunousen) Bosskichi: Fuuka Izumi (Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete) Anne: Yurie Funato (Hoshikuzu Telepa...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kabushikigaisha Magi-Lumière 2nd Season' Unveils Additional Cast, Opening Theme, Second Promo
The official website of the Kabushikigaisha Magi-Lumière 2nd Season (Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc. Season 2) television anime unveiled a pair of additional cast, the opening theme, and a second promotional video on Thursday. The anime series adapting Sekka Iwata and Yuu Aoki's mahou shoujo manga is scheduled to premiere on Nippon TV at 1:05 a.m. on July 5. Voice actors Manaka Iwami (Fruits Basket) and Masaya Fukunishi (Kaijuu 8-gou) are joining the cast as Sakae Tounomori and Hibiki...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Majutsu wo Kiwamete Tabi ni Deta Tensei Elf, Moteamashita Jumyou de Ikeru Densetsu to Naru' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo, 2027 Debut
Production company Asmik Ace opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Monsho Sasakibara's Majutsu wo Kiwamete Tabi ni Deta Tensei Elf, Moteamashita Jumyou de Ikeru Densetsu to Naru (The Reincarnated Elf Left on a Journey to Master His Magic and With His Extra Lifespan Became a Living Legend) light novel on Thursday, revealing the main cast, staff, a teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promotional video. The anime series will premiere in 2027. Voice actors Hana Hishik...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Nisemono no Renkinjutsushi' Receives TV Anime Adaptation
Production company Kadokawa opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Jirou Sugiura and Umemaru's Nisemono no Renkinjutsushi (The Fake Alchemist) manga on Thursday, revealing a teaser visual (pictured), an announcement promo, and Passione as the animation studio. Sugiura originally began drawing the fantasy isekai series on pixiv in February 2020. Kadokawa began serializing the manga on its ComicWalker web service in June 2023 and released the first volume in January 2...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Sunrise Commemorates 50th Anniversary with Six Short Movies
Production company Bandai Namco Filmworks announced a short movie project commemorating Sunrise's 50th anniversary titled Mirai e no Kouro (A Voyage Towards the Future) on Wednesday. The project comprises six original 3DCG short movies, with six participating studios including Sunrise. The official website also revealed the first two shorts with the main staff, teaser visuals (pictured right), and teaser promotional videos. Hidekazu Ohara (Sweat Punch) is directing the short anime Haseo Sug...

text:
'Mebius Dust' Announces Additional Cast
The official website for the Mebius Dust television anime announced additional cast on Wednesday. The anime will premiere on Tokyo MX at 11.30 p.m. followed by BS Fuji and MBS on July 9. Cast Marimo Shippo: Hiroshi Tsuchida (Shingeki no Kyojin) Tenrou: Ryohei Shioguchi Shirayuki: Ryou Hirohashi (Boku no Hero Academia) Takara: Yuuki Kuwahara (Seirei Gensouki) Kirara: Mari Hino (Mato Seihei no Slave) Atsushi: Hiromichi Tezuka (Edens Zero) Tarou Iwasaki (Amaama to Inazuma) is directing the anime at...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Choujun! Choujou-senpai' Unveils Main Cast, First Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Shun Numa's Choujun Choujou-senpai (Super Psychic Policeman Chojo) manga revealed the main cast, main visual (pictured right), and first promotional video on Thursday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on Tuesdays at 11:00 p.m. on Fuji TV and Kantai TV stations in October 2026. Cast Meguru Choujou: Yuusuke Kobayashi (Dr. Stone) Nao Ippongi: Riko Aono (Fumetsu no Anata e Season 3) Robo-kun: Maria Naganawa (Kobayashi-san Chi no Mai...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Yami Shibai' 17th Season Announced for Summer 2026
Television station TV Tokyo announced a 17th season for the Yami Shibai short horror anime series on Friday. The official website also revealed the staff, cast, key visual (pictured), and the theme song. The new season—centered on the theme of "Ketsu" (Decision)—will begin airing on July 12 on TV Tokyo. Staff Director: Akira Funada (Ninja Collection) Script: Kanako Ishigami (Yami Shibai 15), Hiromu Kumamoto (Kowabon), Mitsuhiro Sasaki (KJ File) Storyboard: Shoma Mutou (Yami...

text:
'Neko to Ryuu' Reveals Additional Cast, Theme Songs, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Amara's Neko to Ryuu (The Cat and the Dragon) light novel revealed additional cast, theme songs, key visual (pictured above) and second promotional video on Friday. The anime will premiere on Tokyo MX at 9:00 p.m. on July 4, followed by broadcasts on BS NTV and Yomiuri TV. Cast Greater Daemon: Hinata Tadokoro (Champignon no Majo) Mosha-mosha IV: Youji Ueda (Toujima Tanzaburou wa Kamen Rider ni Naritai) Mikemike: Saho Shirasu (Apoc...

text:
'Tenkou-saki no Seiso Karen na Bishoujo ga, Mukashi Danshi to Omotte Issho ni Asonda Osananajimi Datta Ken' Unveils Additional Staff, Second Main Promo
The official website for the Tenkou-saki no Seiso Karen na Bishoujo ga, Mukashi Danshi to Omotte Issho ni Asonda Osananajimi Datta Ken (Tenkosaki: The Neat and Pretty Girl at My New School Is a Childhood Friend of Mine Who I Thought Was a Boy) television anime unveiled additional staff, a main visual (pictured), and the second main promotional video on Friday. The anime series adapting Yu Hibari's romance comedy light novel will begin airing on July 6 at 11:30 p.m. on Tokyo MX and BS Fuji....

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
MAPPA Produces 'Beat & Motion' Anime Adaptation for 2027
The 15th Anniversary Event of MAPPA announced an anime adaptation of Naoki Fujita's Beat & Motion manga on Friday, revealing main cast, staff, teaser visual (pictured), and a promotional video. The anime will stream exclusively worldwide on Netflix in 2027. Voice actors Shuuichirou Umeda (Make Heroine ga Oosugiru!) and Aya Gomazuru (Hanyou no Yashahime: Sengoku Otogizoushi) are starring as Tatsuhiko Hirayama and Nico Kashiwagi, respectively. Staff Director: Yuki Komada (Rurouni Kenshin:...

text:
MAPPA Produces 'Jimoto Saikou!' Anime Adaptation
The 15th Anniversary Event of MAPPA announced an anime adaptation of usagi's Jimoto Saikou! manga on Friday, revealing the main staff, song, teaser visual (pictured), and a promotional video. The anime is scheduled to premiere worldwide on Netflix. 'Koiseyo Mayakashi Tenshi-domo' Unveils Main Staff, Teaser Promo
The 15th Anniversary Event of MAPPA unveiled the main staff, teaser visual (pictured) and promotional video for the television anime adaptation of Coco Uzuki's Koiseyo Mayakashi Tenshi-domo (Fall in Love, You False Angels) manga on Friday. The anime is scheduled to premiere in 2027. text:
'Tai-Ari deshita.' Unveils Supporting Cast, Main Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Eri Ejima's Tai-Ari deshita.: Ojou-sama wa Kakutou Game nante Shinai (Young Ladies Don't Play Fighting Games) manga revealed supporting cast and the main promotional video on Friday. The anime was initially scheduled for last year but has been delayed to July 7 on AT-X, Tokyo MX, MBS and BS NTV. text:
'Buchigire Reijou wa Houfuku wo Chikaimashita.' Announces Additional Cast Pair
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Metabo Hagure's Buchigire Reijou wa Houfuku wo Chikaimashita. Madousho no Chikara de Sokoku wo Tatakitsubushimasu (A Livid Lady's Guide to Getting Even: How I Crushed My Homeland with My Mighty Grimoires) light novel announced a pair of additional cast on Friday. 'Ryoumin 0-nin Start no Henkyou Ryoushu-sama' Unveils Supporting Cast, Third Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Fuurou's Ryoumin 0-nin Start no Henkyou Ryoushu-sama (The Frontier Lord Begins with Zero Subjects: The Blue-Horned Maiden) unveiled supporting cast, second key visual (pictured), and third promotional video on Friday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX on July 10 at 10:30 p.m., followed by MBS, BS Asahi, and AT-X.
